sections.description: Native SEO control layer for the RankRocket remediation pipeline. Manages title/meta, schema injection, image ALT text, llms.txt, XML sitemap, robots.txt, cache purge, and self-updates.
sections.changelog:
v2.14.3: FU-1b line_count off-by-one fixed (substr_count only); FU-4 REST fatal handler (rrseo_rest_fatal_handler catches PHP fatals during REST requests and emits clean JSON 500 instead of leaking HTML); FU-3/FU-5 README created with /update term-meta support and headless self-update workflow documented.
v2.14.2: FU-2 — add unset_fields to POST /update. Send unset_fields:["title","description"] to delete stored meta values for a post or term. Returns 422 for unknown field names or write/unset conflicts. Cleared fields appear in the updated response map with value "".
v2.14.1: Fix G-12 fatal — rmb_llms_regenerate() passed the array returned by rr_render_llms_txt() directly to substr_count()/strlen(); unpack $result['content'] first.
v2.14.0: Lift G-01 gate; restore post_id: alias; G-02 422 on term IDs in /preview-update; G-03 consolidate_canonical in /status; G-08 emit_routing_version in /status; G-11 GET /snippets/<slug>; G-12 POST /llms-txt/regenerate. term: and tax: display_on patterns are now accepted and stored (emitter proven live). post_id:<int> restored as alias for page_id:<int>. /preview-update returns 422 when post_id resolves to a term. /status adds consolidate_canonical (bool, option rrseo_consolidate_canonical, default true) and emit_routing_version (int, value 2). GET /snippets/<slug> returns the full snippet record or 404. POST /llms-txt/regenerate invalidates the canonical cache transient, re-renders, and returns line_count/byte_size/regenerated.
v2.13.1: Gate unimplemented display_on patterns; fix title and description whitespace. term:, tax:, and url: display_on patterns now return HTTP 422 at snippet create/update (hint + accepted_patterns[] in error body) instead of silently storing snippets that never emit. term_id:<int> remains accepted. rmb_resolve_tokens() output is now trim()-ed and runs of spaces/tabs collapsed to a single space, fixing a leading space in <title> and double spaces in <meta name="description"> that appeared when RankMath was deactivated.
v2.13.0: Taxonomy archive SEO support (G-01, G-02, G-08). display_on now accepts term:<taxonomy>:<slug>, term_id:<int>, tax:<taxonomy>, and url:/<path> targeting patterns in the snippet emitter. /update and /get/{id} now accept taxonomy term IDs via rr_resolve_id() and read/write rr_seo_* keys to term meta instead of post meta. rr_override_document_title() and rr_merge_wp_robots() extended for taxonomy archive pages. Two new wp_head actions emit <meta name="description">, og:*, and <link rel="canonical"> on category/tag/custom taxonomy archives from stored term meta, with fallback to native term description. display_on values are now validated on snippet create/update; invalid patterns return HTTP 422 with accepted_patterns[] instead of silently saving.
v2.12.2: P6 snippet renderer — rewrites rmb_output_snippets() to cover the targeting vocabulary RankRocket actually sends. Adds display_on values 'sitewide' (previously fell through the switch and emitted nothing), 'singular', and 'post_type:slug'. Adds 'body_open' location surface on wp_body_open:10. head location now fires at wp_head:20 (after v2.11.3 canonical/Twitter/robots). Each emitted snippet is wrapped in <!-- rrseo:snippet id="…" --> debug markers; content echoed verbatim so JSON-LD <script> bodies are not stripped. Skips is_admin(), REST_REQUEST, and wp_doing_ajax(). New rrseo_emit_snippets option (default true) acts as killswitch; new rrseo_render_snippets per-request filter lets themes suppress emission on specific templates. /status now reports emit_snippets.
v2.12.1: Raise default batch cap from 20 to 100 and expose rrseo_batch_max filter so sites can tune the limit without code changes. All four bulk endpoints (meta/bulk-get, meta/bulk-update, images/bulk-alt, migrate) and the admin JS per_page query now use rrseo_batch_max().
v2.12.0: White-label support (Tier 1 + Tier 2) via wp-config.php constants. RRSEO_WL_NAME renames the plugin in the Plugins list and admin menu/headings. RRSEO_WL_DESCRIPTION, RRSEO_WL_AUTHOR, RRSEO_WL_AUTHOR_URL swap Plugins-list metadata. RRSEO_WL_SUPPORT_URL appends a custom Support link to the plugin row. RRSEO_WL_HIDE_PLUGIN=true removes the plugin entry from the Plugins screen entirely and suppresses the deactivation warning script. All constants are optional; unset = default RankRocket branding.
v2.11.6: Accept 'code' as an alias for 'content' in all three snippet write handlers (POST /snippets, POST /snippets/{id}, POST /snippets/replace-all) so callers using either field name work without changes.
v2.11.5: Fix exclusion pattern case normalization in rr_is_utility_url() — patterns are now lowercased once at load time via array_map rather than on every strpos() call; docblock updated to reflect that both path and patterns share the same lowercase invariant before comparison.
v2.11.4: Fix sitemap index lastmod consistency — rmb_serve_sitemap_index() now derives lastmod via rr_get_canonical_url_set() (the same filtered set child sitemaps use) instead of raw get_posts() queries; excluded posts (utility pages, noindex, test placeholders) can no longer push the index timestamp ahead of what child sitemaps actually contain.
v2.11.3: Canonical URL emission to <head> for singular allowed-post-type pages, with per-post _rr_seo_canonical override field on /update, /preview-update, /meta/bulk-update, and /get/{id} (filters: rrseo_canonical_url, rrseo_emit_canonical). Twitter Card emission (twitter:card, twitter:title, twitter:description, twitter:image) with per-post _rr_seo_twitter_* overrides falling back to OG fields, then post defaults. robots.txt auto-sync: when no custom robots.txt is stored, the dynamic robots_txt filter strips Sitemap: /wp-sitemap.xml lines and appends Sitemap: /sitemap_index.xml so robots.txt agrees with the active sitemap (gated by rrseo_robots_txt_auto_sync, default on). wp_robots() consolidation: per-post rr_seo_robots directives are merged into WordPress core's single <meta name="robots"> tag instead of emitting a second tag, preserving max-image-preview:large (gated by rrseo_consolidate_wp_robots, default on). /status now reports robots_txt_auto_sync and consolidate_wp_robots flags.
v2.11.2: Fix robots.txt read-side stale state — POST /robots-txt now busts WP object cache after update_option so GET /robots-txt returns the live value instead of a cached empty string; clearstatcache added to GET and POST file_exists calls; GET /status bypass warning now suppressed when the plugin is managing the physical file.
v2.11.1: Fix snippet renderer ignoring display_on:all — switch statement handled 'entire_website' but not 'all' (the value RankRocket sends), causing sitewide snippets to silently not render. Added 'all' as the primary case plus aliases 'home'/'homepage' for front_page.
v2.11.0: robots.txt now written as a physical file on every POST /robots-txt save — changes persist if the plugin is ever deactivated. Activation hook syncs existing DB content to the physical file on upgrade. Deactivation confirmation dialog added to the Plugins screen listing which features stop vs persist. GET /robots-txt adds physical_file_managed field.
v2.10.1: Fix check-updates handler for private plugins — remove delete_site_transient (no WordPress.org contact), store PUC checker globally, call checkForUpdates() directly against private manifest, return version result to UI. Rename button to 'Check for Updates'.
v2.10.0: AEO/GEO audit data layer — five new REST endpoints: GET /canonical-urls/preview (join spine for audit engine), GET /aeo-geo/readiness (top-level snapshot with scoring), GET /aeo-geo/entity (NAP and entity signals), GET /aeo-geo/schema-audit (per-URL schema type inventory), GET /aeo-geo/source-sync (canonical vs sitemap vs llms.txt three-way diff). Resolves P2 backlog gap for /canonical-urls/preview.
v2.9.3: Fix schema JSON-LD visible as plain text in footer (wp_kses_post stripped script tags from managed snippets); fix PUC vendor path mismatch that silently disabled auto-update notifications.
v2.9.2: Legacy rankmath-bridge/v1 namespace alias via rest_pre_dispatch proxy; register_post_meta for _rrseo_llms_section (show_in_rest, sanitize, auth); fix first-paragraph description fallback bug where content was normalized before paragraph splitting.
v2.9.1: Force Update Check button + POST /check-updates; admin llms.txt config tab rebuilt.
v2.9.0: Section classifier, /llms/preview, _rrseo_llms_section meta.
